qa_pairs.question: Which railway has the wheels configuration exactly 4-4-2 and the object number exactly 1975-7005?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT railway.railway_id FROM railway
WHERE railway.wheels = '4-4-2' AND railway.objectnumber = '1975-7005'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which railway entities with wheels equal to '4-4-2' and objectnumber equal to '1975-7005'?

JOIN manager ON railway_manage.manager_id = manager.manager_id
WHERE manager.level <= 5 AND railway_manage.from_year = '2010'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which railway entities having at least one related railway manage record (linked on railway.railway_id = railway_manage.railway_id) with from year equal to '2010', whose railway manage record itself has at least one related manager record (linked on railway_manage.manager_id = manager.manager_id) with level at most '5'?
